User Story: As a photographer, I want to log in with email/password so I can reach my studio dashboard.
As a photographer, I want one-click Google sign-in so I skip password management.
As a photographer on iOS, I want Apple sign-in for fast secure access.
As a photographer, I want an email magic link so I can log in without a password.
As a new photographer, I want to create a studio account and start a free trial.
As a new user, I want to set studio name, logo, and branding during onboarding.
As a photographer, I want to reset a forgotten password by email.
As a studio owner, I want two-factor auth to protect client media.
As a photographer, I want to see active sessions and log out remotely.
As a photographer, I want a dashboard of events, storage used, pending deliveries, and tagging status.
As a photographer, I want a feed of recent uploads, client feedback, and downloads.
As a photographer, I want quick buttons to create event, upload, invite client.
As a photographer, I want photos to auto-upload from camera/card to cloud over SFTP so I stop manually copying files.
As a photographer, I want to generate/rotate SFTP credentials per event.
As a photographer, I want uploads sorted chronologically into event buckets automatically.
As a photographer, I want to drag folders into the browser to upload when off-camera.
As a photographer, I want CR3/RAW handled and previewed, not rejected.
As a photographer, I want resumable uploads so a dropped connection doesn't restart.
As a photographer, I want photos auto-grouped by event so I don't sort manually.
As a photographer, I want every face detected and clustered so I can filter shots by person.
As a photographer, I want a per-person cluster view to quickly find all shots of one guest.
As a photographer, I want AI tags (haldi, dance, candid, traditional, emotion) to speed culling.
As a photographer, I want star ratings and pick/reject flags to cull thousands of shots fast.
As a photographer, I want near-duplicate bursts grouped so I pick one best frame.
As a photographer, I want AI to flag blurry or eyes-closed shots to auto-reject.
As a photographer, I want combined filters (person + tag + rating) to build a selection.
As a photographer, I want a branded shareable gallery so clients review in my studio look.
As a photographer, I want a link/QR so couples review without an account.
As a photographer, I want link expiry and password gating to protect galleries.
As a photographer, I want to see the couple's shortlist so I know which to edit.
As a photographer, I want per-photo comments and approval status from the client.
As a photographer, I want to build a lasting branded digital album from selects.
As a photographer, I want to release final high-res downloads with limits/watermark options.
As a photographer, I want guests to find their photos and upload their POV to boost album value.
As an agency owner, I want to invite editors and assign them to events.
As an owner, I want role-based access (admin/editor/viewer) per event.
As an owner, I want to assign culling/editing tasks and track status.
As a photographer, I want to see storage used and upgrade tiers.
As a photographer, I want old events archived cheaply but restorable.
As a photographer, I want to create/edit/delete events with dates and clients.
As a photographer, I want a client list with contact and event history.
As a studio owner, I want to manage plan, payment method, and invoices.
As a studio, I want galleries on my brand (logo, colors, custom domain).
As a photographer, I want alerts when a client finishes review or a download completes.
